stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents.
substantive: She supports increased funding for the NHS.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “In a democracy, the voter has the last word. That is why I always listen and respond to what voters want.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents. She supports increased funding for the NHS. In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “In a democracy, the voter has the last word. That is why I always listen and respond to what voters want.”
